positive: A minimalist, graphic depiction of a whimsical woodland journey. Center composition featuring a stylized forest scene with silhouettes of deer, foxes, and giant ferns. The style should be inspired by sophisticated retro-modern botanical illustration meets clean graphic design. Use high contrast black and white ink on a subtle cream background, with pops of muted sage green accents. The composition must have clear, scalable elements suitable for repeat patterns or central chest placement. Dramatic backlighting emphasizes the leaf edges and creature outlines. Ink wash texture for depth, clean linework, highly stylized, Art Deco influence, vector graphic quality, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blur, noisy, text, signature, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, low resolution, muted colors, jpeg artifacts, photography, realism
